display_name: Audano et al. 2019 long-read SV catalog
ingest_command: bcftools view audano_2019.sv.vcf.gz | bcftools annotate -x '^INFO/SVTYPE,INFO/SVLEN,INFO/AF,INFO/END' | llmap variant-ingest --source audano_sv_2019 --kind sv --bucket-bp 100 --output audano.priors
notes: Pioneer long-read SV catalog (15 individuals, PacBio CLR). Excellent for VNTR / mid-size INS that short-read catalogs miss.
